_metadata.name: Supabase Project Exposure Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that audits a Supabase project for RLS, storage, API, and database misconfigurations, then writes a prioritized exposure triage report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Supabase Project Exposure Triage
manifest.description: Scan an authorized Supabase project for security posture issues and produce a submission-ready exposure triage report.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Supabase Project Exposure Triage
graph.description: Authorized Supabase project exposure workflow for bug bounty and security research triage.

runtimeInputs.label: Supabase project URL
runtimeInputs.description: Project URL or 20-character project ref, for example https://abcdefghijklmno12345.supabase.co.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, ownership confirmation, and reporting constraints for this Supabase project.

requiredSecrets.name: SUPABASE_DATABASE_URL
requiredSecrets.description: Postgres connection string from Supabase Project Settings → Database (URI format with sslmode=require).
